title: The Salty Solution for a Frozen Island
summary: When the Ice Dragon, Icicle, accidentally freezes Dimitar’s circular island while trying to stop a volcanic eruption, the island's inhabitants must find a new home. Seeker and his friends Isabella and the superhero Mia Mayhem set out on a magic ladder to confront Icicle at his mountain palace. Upon learning Icicle's good intentions, they team up with Kitty, Zoe, and Sassafras to melt the frozen landscape using massive amounts of salt and warm water. After a successful cleanup, the residents celebrate with a salty feast, having saved the island from both fire and ice.

highlightQuote.text: But Icicle froze his whole island, so now we have to live at Hattie's workshop.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ding dong Seeker.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Who is it? said Seeker.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's Hattie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh hi Hattie. I heard you were sick. Are you feeling better?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yep. Now it's Dimitar's turn of being sick.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But Icicle froze his whole island, so now we have to live at Hattie's workshop.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wait a minute, said Seeker. You're telling me that Icicle froze Dimitar's circular island?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Why'd he do that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know. Maybe we should go talk to him about it because that's not really fair because Dimitar likes living there.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Dimitar likes living there, that's right.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ding, it's your phone Seeker.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, who is it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's Isabella.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh hi Isabella, said Seeker.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, I think that when we go to Nana's, I can give you a tour of Nana's from Izzy.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I'd love that, said Seeker. What kind of things does Nana have at her house?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A dollhouse where you can live in. It's the best one in the world. It has stairs and everything.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow, that's very interesting.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: There's even real can-draw pencils for the mice.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Real can-draw pencils for the mice? Like tiny ones?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, tiny ones.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: That's amazing, said Seeker. But they might get lost.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I see.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, thank you Isabella. I'm looking forward to that, but we have a big problem to solve right now so I better get back to it. Hattie's here and she told me that there's a big problem on Dimitar's island, which is that Icicle froze the whole thing.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, well then I need to call my friend Mia Mayhem.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, alright. She can help you look, because she's one of my superhero friends.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Where are you Mia Mayhem?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, hi. I was just in the middle of something.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Wait a minute, but you need to stop time on something. You need to stop time on something because there's a big problem in New York City where Seeker lives.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh yeah? What's the problem?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Icicle froze Dimitar's whole island and now Dimitar's really mad at Icicle. They got into a really big fight.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I'm so sorry to hear that. What can we do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Do you think we should talk to Icicle about it first?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, talk to Icicle. Seeker, I'm just having a conversation with Mia Mayhem about what to do.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh yeah? What'd she think?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She thought we could talk to Icicle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah, that does seem like a good idea because I don't know what Icicle was up to freezing that whole island, and he must've known that Dimitar wouldn't like it. But maybe there was a good reason and Dimitar just didn't know, or maybe we should help Icicle apologize and fix it. But we'd better go find out.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so, did they fly in the sky ship to Icicle's palace on top of the mountain of ice, or...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They used Seeker's magic ladder.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, they flew on the ladder. So who's gonna go visit Icicle? Seeker and...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hattie... no no no, Isabella and Mia Mayhem.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Isabella and Mia Mayhem. And they'll borrow the magic ladder?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yep.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Isabella and Mia Mayhem came to Seeker's house and said 'Can we borrow your magic ladder?' and Seeker said 'Well, it's not totally up to me, I think it's fine, but you'll have to ask the ladder. And I recommend being very polite because the ladder can be cranky sometimes, but he loves to fly.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ladder, can me and Mia Mayhem ride you?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Seeker said 'Oh, that means the ladder's not sure. Why don't you tell him where you're gonna go?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We're going to go to Icicle's mountain.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Seeker says the ladder loves flying there. And the ladder shot out the window and started flying toward the mountain and Seeker said 'No, no wait, you gotta take them with you!'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Isabella said 'I can use my powers to help me fly! (Whooshing noises)'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Isabella flew over to the magic ladder and caught up with him.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Mia Mayhem was on my back the whole time.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so superhero Isabella and Mia Mayhem and the ladder flew far, far up into the sky away from Seeker's castle until they could see in the far distance past a whole bunch of clouds the pointy tops of a range of snow-covered mountains, and right in the middle of the tallest one had a sparkling ice palace on top. And they flew and flew and flew through the wind and the clouds until they arrived at the palace and they landed in front.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They rang Icicle's doorbell. Ding-dong.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Icicle said 'Oh, who is that?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's Isabella and Mia Mayhem. Why did you freeze Dimitar's island? I want to know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wait, slow down, slow down. Come on in, have a frozen snack or two, and we'll talk it over. And so they all went inside Icicle's palace, and he served them a variety of frozen treats, such as popsicles, ice cream, and...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't like ice cream.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: ...ice cubes and...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I like ice cubes. But Icicle says, I'm going to put them in a water cup and stir them, wait for them to melt, and then I'll just take a sip and that feels good to me.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Right, said Icicle. And so, you had a question about Dimitar's island. Well, let me tell you the story. As you know, Dimitar lives on an amazing island. It is perfectly circular and has a mountain in the center. But unfortunately, that mountain is no ordinary mountain. It's a volcano. And one day when I was visiting Dimitar, I think we were playing checkers... yes, that must've been the case... because I remember the whole table started to rattle. And then it stopped. And I said 'What was that, Dimitar?' He said 'Oh, I'm sure it's nothing.' But I knew it was something because I could tell. You see, I know mountains, I live on one. Mine isn't a volcano, but I've met several other mountains that are, and you can tell when they're about to erupt. And I knew that volcano was about to erupt, and if it erupted, it might destroy Dimitar's castle and all the villages of the dragonets that live on his island with him. And so I decided to do something about it. I flew up and I blew my ice breath into the volcano to freeze the magma so it wouldn't erupt.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Wow. But you froze, but you froze his whole island, and why did you do that?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I didn't mean to. Maybe I used too much ice. That's terrible. Is everybody okay?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh, oh, oh, I know Dimitar, I could just, I could just give you ice skates.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Ice skates? What are those?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They're just things with wheels that, and we hold onto some bars and we skate around on them. It's really fun.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: That does sound very interesting, but I don't think it would help very much.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh it will help, it's good for skating on ice. They help us move quickly.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I see, I see. Well, I have wings and I can fly, and you somehow got here through the air. How'd you do that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I used Seeker's magic ladder, and the ladder said he loved going to the mountain.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, he sure does. We have very good gusts of wind here at the top of the mountain and he likes to zoom around and do tricks. Now then, I think that... wait a minute, where's Dimitar? Is he okay, or did he get frozen too?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh no, he didn't get frozen.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's good.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He's in bed, he has the cold, but his bed is frozen.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh no, he caught a cold? I hope my ice didn't make him feel sick.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No no, it was not your ice.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It wasn't?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No no no, no no, he was allergic to the volcano's lava and magma.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh. Oh, well that's strange. Anyway, we'd better go to the circular island and see if we can melt all the ice. And that's not a superpower that I have, we'll have to find somebody else who can help us.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh, I know. Instead of calling Mia Mayhem for that, I need two superheroes: Mia Mayhem and Kitty.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Kitty? Who's that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She has cat-like superpowers, I hope she knows what to do. And also I need Zoe and Sassafras.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Who are they?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They're people, and Kitty's a person too. Just like me, I'm a person.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: So many people around here. Well...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No no no, they just live five streets away from your house and Dimitar's and Seeker's.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, we are neighbors, all of us, that's true. Okay, how about this: I'll meet you on the circular island. Let's meet near Dimitar's castle, and then we'll see what we can do, okay?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Okay. See you there.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, Zoe and Sassafras and Kitty, I need you.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay! For what?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: For helping us solve a problem that we need, that we need you to.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, okay, where are you?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, I'm on Dimitar's circular island.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay! We'll be right there.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You need ice skates, okay? Ice skates.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I thought it was warm there. Okay, I'll bring 'em.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's not, it's not warm, Icicle froze it. So you need ice skates.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh my goodness! I think I know what to do, said Zoe. And so Isabella and Mia Mayhem and Kitty and her cat crew and Zoe and Sassafras all met up on the mountainside in the middle of the circular island right next to Dimitar's castle. And all around, everything was covered in ice. There were icicles everywhere sparkling in the sun.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Zoe? Um, remember when you used salt and warm water to melt it?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's an amazing idea! But where are we going to get enough salt to cover a whole island?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Wait, you could just use a whole salt box. Or maybe a whole salt container.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then they heard a whoosh-whoosh-whoosh, and that was the huge wings of Icicle, the gigantic ancient ice dragon flying down beneath them. And Icicle said 'Hello! Have you figured out anything that we can do?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We can do salt and warm water. Um, and Zoe's got a whole box of salt and she's ready to dump it all over the island.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Now that is a pretty big box of salt, but I am a dragon. I'm much bigger than you, and you know what I like to do when I eat my food? I like to season it. And so I need a lot of salt. So the box of salt I have at home is almost the size of this entire castle. I'll just go home and get it and bring it back.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Zoe dumped her box was this big. So she dumped it all over the island and she got a big box of warm water and dumped it.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then Icicle came back with his gigantic box of salt and dumped that all over the island too.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Icicle, Zoe's was this big and it covered the entire island.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I'm just trying to help.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Okay. So then there's more warm water, and Zoe's was this big Icicle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow, that's a lot of salt. I hope this works. And so as they poured...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Dimitar said 'What is going on in my, on my island?'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Seeker said 'Okay, okay, Dimitar, don't worry. We're just trying to melt the ice.' And Dimitar said 'With seasoning? Everything's going to taste like salt!'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No no no, that's just to melt the ice.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh. Well, you're going to rinse it off, right?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, I'm going to rinse it off.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, good. Wow, it's really turning slushy. It was such beautiful shiny crystals of ice but now it's all starting to melt and little rivers of the ice water are pouring down the side of the mountain.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But I can keep one ice cube in some place that the, that no sun can get into.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Maybe my basement, under the...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No no no, I'm going to play in my basement. I'm going to play in a safety container.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. And so after a while, thanks to Zoe's scientific knowledge about melting ice with salt, they were able to melt all the ice off of the circular island. And everything tasted a little bit salty for a while, but not for too long, and they were happy.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then Isabella poured water on everything that got covered in salt. And then, and then what did Dimitar say?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: He said 'I'm still a little sick but I'm starting to feel better and uh...'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: 'What do you think about your island?'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'It looks alright. Thanks for your help in fixing it up. And thanks Icicle for stopping the volcano from erupting, but I'm glad you came back with all that salt to help too.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Icicle said 'Yes, I'm glad everything worked out okay. And just let me know next time you think that volcano might erupt and I can try to help without freezing everything.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Or I can help, because I have protective metal and I can put it on myself while getting my ice powers all set, and then next time I'm going to play in the volcano but not freeze anything.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Dimitar said 'Okay, well thank you.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I have some ice sets. They're just sets of colors, but they're made of ice, so I can freeze the volcano. But not the island.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Good idea. And Dimitar said 'Hey, let's celebrate. Let's have a big party there.' And so all the dragonets came that night and they had a huge feast of all sorts of delicious salty snacks. And they invited Icicle and Seeker and Mia Mayhem and Zoe and Sassafras and Isabella...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Kitty of course. Icicle, I know someone who really loves ice... Elsa Pony. She's a pony but she has ice powers, and she really likes freezing things. She just freezes things all day.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Sounds like we might have a lot in common. I'd love to meet her someday.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She's coming here today at the party. Yep, but you can see her in general, they have a toy of her. And there's a movie about her. It's just something I watch but it's not real. And there's songs about her and there's stories about her. You can look things up about the movie on your phone.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Shadow puppet. That's the end of the story. Okay, shadow puppets.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Look at that.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow, a heart-shaped shadow. I love it. All right. That's the end of Stars and Stories and Shadow Puppets.

characters.name: Seeker
characters.description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

characters.name: Hattie the Mouse
characters.description: A nimble, friendly mouse of Possible Street and loyal friend to Izzy and Seeker, this brave artisan is the wife of Dimitar and mistress of the Workshop of Hats—a weathered hollow tree sanctuary on Cornell Street scented with cedar, ink, and peanut butter toast. Clad in her signature red cloak and pointy hat, she is a resourceful hatmaker whose spirit was forged against massive diggers and the rain-slicked Floofer Cloud. Within her paint-stained home, she carefully curates her husband’s library alongside her own hand-painted volumes while confronting a baffling supply mystery; the discovery of curious clover stickers signals a gathering shadow of intrigue she is determined to unravel.

characters.name: Dimitar
characters.description: A sharp-witted resident of a circular island castle, this two-century-old purple dragonet carries a pirate’s salt-crusted legacy and a fierce devotion to his salvaged library. Formerly of the Cadasori galleries, Seeker’s grumpy companion now roams the deep to save his ancestral shores, though a recent volcanic disturbance has left him uncharacteristically sickened and frail. Driven by habit and a tireless appetite for fish, he bickers incessantly over snacks while guarding his remaining volumes with a brooding, protective intensity.

characters.name: Icicle
characters.description: A titanic and ancient white ice dragon, this towering companion to Dimitar commands the skies with freezing breath and vast, powerful wings. From a shimmering ice palace atop a remote mountain peak, he presides over his crystalline domain with a timeless and frigid majesty, sustained exclusively by a diet of frozen fish.

characters.name: Isabella
characters.description: A towering Dimatar scholar and alchemist of Atsukeeseet, Mama Izzy is a clever kiddo at heart and a steadfast guardian of rooftop gardens and intricate dollhouses. Gifted with the power of flight, she navigates the open heights with aquatic grace, her massive frame often shielded by a special protective metal that glimmers even as she descends into the shadows. As a resourceful quartermaster, she employs red flashlights, gold-laced slimes, and pipe cleaners to mend a Lanternshark’s failing light, yet her generosity remains her hallmark; she freely shares her vast library, brokers homes for dragons, and teaches others to find the resonance in their own voices. Her most profound magic resides in her vast, soft blanket—a sanctuary of ultimate coziness—where she remains a brave, quick-witted protector to all who honor her singular request for absolute silence.

characters.name: Nana
characters.description: The dignified mole matriarch and grandmother to Hattie, Pistis, and Isabella, this pillar of watchful wisdom resides at the end of the train line, tackling life’s problems "one at a time." From engineering mouse-scale Lego structures to the meticulous restoration of dollhouses using patient glue and tiny pencils, her steady paws bridge the gap between architectural feats and delicate artistry. Whether discerning potential as a trolley passenger or welcoming weary travelers into her sanctuary, her quiet authority is so legendary that she graces the cover of Hattie’s book in a rare, peaceful slumber. Even in rest, she remains the heart of their world—a steady warmth anchoring every journey’s end, her sharp eyes softening for Izzy’s mushroom-textured crafts.

characters.name: Kitty
characters.description: Isabella’s loyal companion and a valiant superhero, this feline-costumed commander harnesses agile, cat-like powers to lead an intrepid crew through the drifting wonders of Balloon World. Bound by a mission of guardianship, she navigates the whimsical floating realm on daring adventures, rescuing lost treasures and protecting every creature she encounters.

characters.name: Zoe
characters.description: A character with scientific knowledge about melting ice using salt.

characters.name: Elsa Pony
characters.description: A pony with ice powers who loves freezing things.

characters.name: Dragonets
characters.description: Little dragons who live in villages on Dimitar's circular island.

places.name: Hattie's workshop
places.description: The sunlit cradle of Hattie’s grand adventure, this workshop remains a sanctuary of craftsmanship and logic where she shapes her signature hats and untangles complex puzzles—now serving as a warm, vital refuge for the islanders after their home was lost to the frost.

places.name: Dimitar's Circular Island
places.description: An island with a volcano and a castle, which becomes entirely frozen.

places.name: Seeker's castle
places.description: Seeker's home located in New York City.

places.name: Nana's house
places.description: At the final stop of the long train journey stands a meticulously crafted dollhouse, a quiet sanctuary where tiny, sharpened pencils await the scholarly paws of resident mice.

places.name: Icicle's ice palace
places.description: A sparkling palace located on the tallest peak of a snow-covered mountain range.
